hero.subtitle: Xplania is your intelligent travel copilot. Budget, visas, packing — every step of your prep, centralized in one place.
hero.toolsAvail: already available to plan and live your journey:
hero.earlyExplorerDesc: Join our community of beta testers

features.title: Everything you need to leave with peace of mind
features.subtitle: Eight AI-powered tools to prepare, live and tell your trip from A to Z

valise.title: Smart packing
valise.tagline: A tailor-made checklist of what to bring.
valise.description: We automatically generate a packing list adapted to your destination, the forecast and the duration of your stay. No more forgotten essentials or overweight bags.

budget.title: Budget guide
budget.tagline: Estimate and track your spending while traveling.
budget.description: We estimate the total cost of your trip based on the country and your travel style, and you track your spending day by day to stay within your plan.
budget.benefit2: Adjust your budget to local cost of living

visa.title: Visa & paperwork guide
visa.tagline: Know exactly which documents to prepare before leaving.
visa.description: We give you the precise list of documents required based on your nationality and destination: visa, passport, vaccines, insurance.
visa.benefit2: Have all required documents on D-day

journal.title: Travel journal
journal.tagline: Document and relive your trip in just a few clicks.
journal.description: Notes, photos, moods and places, day by day. AI turns your memories into an immersive story, exportable as PDF and shareable via public link.
journal.benefit1: Keep an emotional trace of every trip
journal.benefit2: Share your memories with your loved ones

tracking.title: Live trip tracking
tracking.tagline: Your real-time companion during the trip.
tracking.description: Live map, dynamic timeline of stops, automatic check-in on arrival and hyper-local AI suggestions based on your location, weather and mood.
tracking.benefit1: Track your progress and stats live

explore.title: Travel Map
explore.tagline: Your trip becomes an exploration game.
explore.description: Branched interactive map, clickable points, badges to unlock and gamified progression. Every place you visit earns you points and brings you closer to the ultimate Globe Trotter badge.
explore.benefit1: Explore your trip like a living game
explore.benefit2: Unlock badges and points by visiting

mood.title: Mood Explorer
mood.tagline: Pick an emotion, we'll find the perfect spot.
mood.description: You're not looking for a place, you're looking for a feeling. Pick your mood (chill, romantic, food, party…) and get hyper-personalized AI recommendations based on your location, the weather and the time of day.

discover.title: Discover
discover.tagline: The best local spots around you, in real time.
discover.description: Contextual recommendations based on your location, time and weather. Interactive map, hidden gems, natural-language search ('brunch with a view') and personal lists to organize your favorites.
discover.benefit2: Get hidden-gem alerts as you walk

howItWorks.title: How Xplania works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple three-step approach to travel with peace of mind
howItWorks.step1Title: Tell us where you want to go
howItWorks.step1Desc: Destination, dates, travel style: we ask just the right questions — neither too many nor too few.
howItWorks.step2Desc: In seconds, you get your budget, packing list and visa requirements, ready to use.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Travel journal, live tracking, mood explorer and real-time recommendations: everything is already available in the beta.

benefits.subtitle: Xplania isn't just a website, it's your intelligent travel copilot. We remove the mental load of budget, visas and packing so you can focus on what matters: the joy of discovery.
benefits.timeDesc: Stop spending hours digging through contradictory info on visas or budget. Xplania centralizes everything.
benefits.calmDesc: Leave with the certainty you forgot nothing thanks to smart, personalized planning.
benefits.controlDesc: Manage your budget in real time with estimates based on the local cost of living.

beta.subtitle: Join an exclusive community of passionate travelers shaping the future of travel
beta.feedbackDesc: Your input directly improves the product. Every suggestion counts to build the perfect travel tool.
beta.earlyDesc: Discover new features before anyone else and try innovations first-hand.
beta.communityDesc: Join the Early Explorers and help shape the future of intelligent travel.
beta.shareSubtitle: Your feedback is essential to improve Xplania and build the perfect travel tool

dashboard.title: Your trip at a glance
dashboard.subtitle: An intuitive dashboard centralizing every essential piece of information
dashboard.createFirstDesc: Enter your destination and dates to unlock a personalized dashboard with estimated budget, visa requirements and packing recommendations.
dashboard.noVisaData: No document data available. Generate a travel plan to see results.
dashboard.noLuggageData: No packing data available. Generate a travel plan to see results.

myDashboard.noTripsCta: Ready to plan your next adventure?
myDashboard.noTripsDesc: Get started: plan your first trip in less than 2 minutes.
myDashboard.ctaInspirationDesc: Let AI suggest a mood or a surprise spot.

guideValise.toastModeOnDesc: The checklist has been adapted by AI.
guideValise.toastTransportDesc: List adapted to your trip constraints.

guideVisa.title: Visa & Administrative Paperwork
guideVisa.subtitle: The essential info before you leave.
guideVisa.errIncomplete: Incomplete AI response. Please try again.
guideVisa.stepProfile: Xplania is analyzing your traveler profile…

footer.tagline: Your intelligent travel copilot. Plan, prepare and live your trips powered by artificial intelligence. Xplania centralizes budget, documents and packing so you can travel light-hearted.
footer.betaNote: Xplania is currently being tested by early travelers to refine the experience.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Xplania – Exclusive beta program – Built with ❤️ for travelers

waitlist.defaultTeaser: Drop your email to be notified first and get -30% off at launch.
waitlist.feature2: Lifetime pricing reserved for early adopters
waitlist.noCard: No credit card required — unsubscribe in one click.
waitlist.successDesc: We'll write you the moment premium opens. Promise, no spam 💌
waitlist.errorGeneric: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again.

feedback.title: Give my feedback
feedback.suggestionsPlaceholder: Share your ideas, suggestions or thoughts...
feedback.problemsPlaceholder: Describe any bugs or issues you ran into...
feedback.errorRequired: Please fill in all fields and give a rating
feedback.errorSend: Something went wrong while sending. Check the console.
feedback.successToast: Thanks for your feedback — you're helping shape Xplania ✨
feedback.thanksDesc: Thanks for your feedback — you're helping shape Xplania ✨

onboarding.step1Title: Tell us where you dream of going
onboarding.step1Desc: Pick a quick, personalized or fully tailored mode. We adapt to your level of detail — 3 questions or 10, you decide.
onboarding.step2Title: Our AI prepares everything for you
onboarding.step2Desc: In seconds, we generate a personalized itinerary, your packing list, the estimated budget and visa requirements adapted to your destination.
onboarding.step3Desc: Everything is centralized: local tips, cultural advice, weather and budget. All you have to do is enjoy the trip.

auth.confirmEmailNote: You'll receive a confirmation email before you can sign in.
auth.signupSuccess: Check your inbox to confirm your sign-up ✉️

upgrade.teaser: Loved {{tool}}? Unlock unlimited access at premium launch and get -30% as an early bird.

offres.title: Choose the plan that fits you
offres.subtitle: Start free, then build your subscription pack by pack.
offres.freeFeat1: 3 free trip generations (to try the 3 questionnaires)
offres.packsSubtitle: Pick your packs and the duration that suits you.
offres.perTripNote: Ideal for occasional travelers who go 1–2 times a year. Pay only when you need it, no commitment.
offres.betaNote: Beta in progress — payments aren't active yet. All free features remain accessible during this testing phase.
offres.waitlistTeaserPack: Be the first to unlock the {{pack}} at launch, with -30% as an early bird.

admin.name: Admin Pack
admin.tagline: Travel calmly while handling all the practical side
admin.f2: Smart suitcase guide (checklist tailored to your destination)

creatif.name: Creative Pack
creatif.tagline: Live your trip as a unique, playful experience
creatif.f1: Personalized travel journal (interactive log, photos, memories)
creatif.f2: Mood Explorer (activities and places by mood)
creatif.f3: Gamification with badges (challenges, achievements to unlock)

ia.name: AI Pack
ia.f1: Deep analysis of an existing itinerary

intercultural.name: Intercultural Pack
intercultural.tagline: Travel respecting and understanding local culture

futur.name: Future Pack
futur.tagline: Explore and get inspired even before you leave
futur.f2: Augmented reality (contextual info during the trip)

all.name: All Access
all.f1: Full access to all 5 packs (Admin, Creative, AI, Intercultural, Future)

valise.modesSubtitle: 11 premium styles — pick one to instantly adapt the contents
valise.weatherCheckManually: Check the weather manually before departure
valise.toastTemplateSavedDesc: Reuse it for your next trips.
valise.toastSyncedDesc: Your suitcase is linked to your itinerary.

valise.outfitsSubtitle: Looks tailored to your activities, weather and cultural context
valise.activitiesSubtitle: Add or remove items based on planned activities

budget.heroSubtitle: Plan, track and optimize your spending with Xplania AI.
budget.configSubtitle: AI analyzes your preferences to build a personal budget
budget.summarySubtitle: AI will use this data to build a tailored budget
budget.summaryNoTripDesc: To generate a personal budget, fill the travel form on the home page first.
budget.addExpenseSubtitle: Log your spending for real-time tracking
budget.addAutoClassify: I can auto-classify your expenses if you want.
budget.addToastMissing: Fill at least amount and category
budget.trackerSubtitle: Real-time tracking of your spending by category
budget.forecastSubtitle: Smart distribution of your budget by category
budget.chartsSubtitle: Detailed view of your spending habits
budget.chartsAiOver: At this pace, you risk going {{n}}€ over budget. AI suggests cutting activity expenses or raising your forecast budget.
budget.chartsAiOk: At this pace you'll stay within budget with {{n}}€ to spare. Keep it up!
budget.alertsSubtitle: AI watches your spending and suggests fixes
budget.tipsSubtitle: Practical tips to travel smart and save

local.d: Eat local to cut costs and discover real cuisine at your destination.

transit.d: Use public transit instead of taxis to save up to 70%.

museum.d: Visit free museums on Mondays or take advantage of free-entry days.

lastMin.d: Book some activities the day before to get up to 30% off.

shop.d: Buy souvenirs at local markets rather than tourist hotspots.

breakfast.d: Pick a stay with breakfast included to save on meals.

walk.d: Join free walking tours (tip-based) to explore without breaking the bank.

pass.d: Buy a city pass if you plan to visit several paid attractions.

genSteps.s2: Xplania is computing your optimal budget…

gamification.heroSubtitle: Explore, collect and unlock unique badges
